meta.meta_description: Connect with our clinical team for guidance on your procedure, appointment or care pathway at City Hospital.

hero.title: Get Patient Guidance
hero.description: Fill in a few details and our patient services team will connect you with the right clinical specialist.

trust_items.label: Right Department
trust_items.note: We'll direct you to the right team

trust_items.label: Prompt Response
trust_items.note: We aim to respond within 1 working day

form.heading: Tell us about your query
form.time_label: When do you need a response?

items.title: Surgery Information
items.description: Pre and post-operative guidance for all surgical procedures.

items.title: Cardiology Care
items.description: Information and guidance on heart conditions and cardiac procedures.

items.title: Orthopaedics
items.description: Guidance on joint replacement, fractures and physiotherapy.

items.title: Maternity Services
items.description: Antenatal, birth and postnatal information and support.

items.title: Clinical Expertise
items.description: All guidance comes from our experienced NHS clinical teams.

items.title: Patient-Centred
items.description: We tailor information to your specific procedure and circumstances.

items.title: Confidential
items.description: Your enquiry is handled in line with NHS confidentiality standards.
